scripts.build: pnpm --filter @alexandrian/protocol run compile && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/protocol run build && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/sdk-core run build && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/sdk-adapters run build
scripts.test:m1: pnpm --filter @alexandrian/protocol test && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/conformance test && vitest run tests/specification/ tests/invariants/ tests/demonstration/ tests/determinism/ tests/property/ tests/composition/
scripts.generate: pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run build && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run generate:all
scripts.generate:seeds: pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run build && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run generate:seeds
scripts.generate:derived: pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run build && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run generate:derived
scripts.generate:repair: pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run build && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run repair
scripts.generate:repair:dry: pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run build && pnpm --filter @alexandrian/generator run repair:dry
